title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Pizza Hut India Asia Pacific Associates
company: Pizza Hut India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Pizza Hut India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Pizza Hut India Asia Pacific Associates in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Pizza Hut India Asia Pacific Associates:
Pizza Hut India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pizza Hut India Asia Pacific Associates!
